title: Whelk fisheries management plan (FMP) for English waters
body: "The whelk fisheries management plan (FMP) covers stocks in English waters only.  Defra prepared the whelk FMP in partnership with the Sea Fish Industry Authority (Seafish). Seafish worked with the Whelk Management Group, a collaborative forum that brings together industry, academia, government regulators and policy makers.  The whelk FMP has been prepared and published to meet the requirements set out in the Fisheries Act 2020.  Read more about fisheries management plans.  Area covered  English waters.  Status  A public consultation to seek views on the draft plan closed on 1 October 2023. View the consultation and the government response at Whelk: proposed fisheries management plan consultation.  The final FMP was published in December 2023.  Contact us  If you would like more information, email FMPs@defra.gov.uk.  "
